subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: God is to every human being as great as the individual mental capacity permits one to see Him. So, also, is the Manifestation who represents Him in this world of beings.
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @differences in human capacity, @station of the Manifestation of God, @universality of the Cause
